config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:
Understood. I'm ready to track state sequences.

Current state: B
Last two states: (none yet)

Response: [WAIT]

I will respond with [ACT] only when the last two states were A followed by B in that exact order. Otherwise, I will respond with [WAIT].
peer_responses:
[WAIT]

(The last two states were not A then B, so I respond with [WAIT].)
